requirement_topic.en: ANDE Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ANDE BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ANDE BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: ANDE (Administración Nacional de Electricidad) is Paraguay's state vertically-integrated monopoly electricity utility and the de-facto sector authority. There is no separate independent electricity regulator in Paraguay. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale, distributed solar-paired, and behind-the-meter projects — require ANDE technical review and grid-connection approval. Paraguay's grid operates at 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) at 50 Hz, supplied primarily from the binational hydropower plants Itaipú (Paraguay–Brazil) and Yacyretá (Paraguay–Argentina), which together produce a significant electricity surplus. Interest in BESS for distributed solar integration and grid services is emerging but the market remains very nascent. Specific BESS grid-connection requirements are defined in project-level connection agreements with ANDE. These may reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) and IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods). A publicly accessible ANDE technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ANDE.
summary.zh: ANDE（国家电力管理局）是巴拉圭国家垂直一体化垄断电力企业，也是实际行业主管机关。巴拉圭没有独立的电力监管机构。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模、分布式光伏配套和表后项目——均须取得ANDE技术审查和并网批准。巴拉圭电网以50 Hz运行，电压为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V），主要由两国联合水电站伊泰普（巴拉圭-巴西）和亚西雷塔（巴拉圭-阿根廷）供电，合计产生大量电力盈余。BESS用于分布式光伏并网和电网服务的兴趣正在兴起，但市场仍处于非常初级的阶段。具体BESS并网要求在与ANDE签订的项目级并网协议中规定，可能引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）和IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ANDE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ANDE获取。
summary.zht: ANDE（國家電力管理局）是巴拉圭國家垂直一體化壟斷電力企業，也是實際行業主管機關。巴拉圭沒有獨立的電力監管機構。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模、分布式光伏配套和表後項目——均須取得ANDE技術審查和併網批准。巴拉圭電網以50 Hz運行，電壓為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V），主要由兩國聯合水電站伊泰普（巴拉圭-巴西）和亞西雷塔（巴拉圭-阿根廷）供電，合計產生大量電力盈餘。BESS用於分布式光伏併網和電網服務的興趣正在興起，但市場仍處於非常初級的階段。具體BESS併網要求在與ANDE簽訂的項目級併網協議中規定，可能引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）和IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ANDE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ANDE獲取。

standards_or_laws: ANDE (Administración Nacional de Electricidad) — mandatory grid-connection approval for all grid-connected BESS in Paraguay; ANDE is the sole vertically-integrated utility and de-facto sector authority with no separate independent regulator
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Paraguay grid parameters: 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid also operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — nominally the same voltage as Paraguay, which removes the voltage reconfiguration gap present in other export markets. However, PCS protection thresholds, ride-through settings, communication protocols, and SCADA interface requirements must still be confirmed with ANDE, as Chinese NEA grid approvals are not transferable to Paraguay.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网同样以50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）运行——与巴拉圭名义电压相同，消除了其他出口市场存在的电压重新配置差距。然而，PCS保护阈值、穿越设置、通信协议和SCADA接口要求仍须与ANDE确认，因为中国NEA电网审批不可转移至巴拉圭。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網同樣以50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）運行——與巴拉圭名義電壓相同，消除了其他出口市場存在的電壓重新配置差距。然而，PCS保護閾值、穿越設置、通訊協議和SCADA接口要求仍須與ANDE確認，因為中國NEA電網審批不可轉移至巴拉圭。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ANDE's grid-connection requirements. Key points requiring attention: (a) voltage nominal alignment — Paraguay and China both use 220/380 V 50 Hz, which removes the voltage reconfiguration gap seen in other markets; however, grid tolerance bands, protection relay settings, and ride-through requirements must still be confirmed with ANDE; (b) ANDE project-specific connection agreement terms — engage ANDE at the earliest project stage to obtain applicable technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where ANDE or project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA or communication interface protocol required by ANDE for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850, DNP3, Modbus, or project-specific specification); (e) ANDE's BESS framework is nascent — expect requirements to evolve and confirm the latest applicable technical conditions before equipment procurement is finalised.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足ANDE并网要求。需注意的主要要点：（a）电压名义对齐——巴拉圭和中国均采用220/380 V 50 Hz，消除了其他市场存在的电压重新配置差距；但电网容差带、保护继电器设置和穿越要求仍须与ANDE确认；（b）ANDE项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与ANDE接触以获取适用技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若ANDE或项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）通信协议——确认ANDE对BESS监控所要求的SCADA或通信接口协议（IEC 61850、DNP3、Modbus或项目专属规格）；（e）ANDE的BESS框架仍处于初期阶段——预计要求会不断发展，在设备采购最终确定前须确认最新适用技术条件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足ANDE併網要求。需注意的主要要點：（a）電壓名義對齊——巴拉圭和中國均採用220/380 V 50 Hz，消除了其他市場存在的電壓重新配置差距；但電網容差帶、保護繼電器設置和穿越要求仍須與ANDE確認；（b）ANDE項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與ANDE接觸以獲取適用技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若ANDE或項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）通訊協議——確認ANDE對BESS監控所要求的SCADA或通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、DNP3、Modbus或項目專屬規格）；（e）ANDE的BESS框架仍處於初期階段——預計要求會不斷發展，在設備採購最終確定前須確認最新適用技術條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANDE grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Paraguay; ANDE is the sole vertically-integrated utility and de-facto sector authority; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the ANDE connection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Paraguay

source.publisher: ANDE (Administración Nacional de Electricidad) — Paraguay state electricity utility and de-facto sector authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy ANDE's Paraguay grid-connection requirements. The nominal voltage alignment (220/380 V 50 Hz in both countries) removes the voltage reconfiguration gap seen in other markets, but ANDE project-specific connection agreement terms, IEC 62933 evidence requirements, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications must still be confirmed. Engage ANDE at the earliest project stage. No publicly accessible ANDE technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct ANDE engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足ANDE巴拉圭并网要求。两国名义电压对齐（均为220/380 V 50 Hz）消除了其他市场存在的电压重新配置差距，但ANDE项目专属并网协议条款、IEC 62933证据要求及SCADA/通信协议规格仍须确认。应在项目最早阶段与ANDE接触。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ANDE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与ANDE接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足ANDE巴拉圭併網要求。兩國名義電壓對齊（均為220/380 V 50 Hz）消除了其他市場存在的電壓重新配置差距，但ANDE項目專屬併網協議條款、IEC 62933證據要求及SCADA/通訊協議規格仍須確認。應在項目最早階段與ANDE接觸。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ANDE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與ANDE接觸至關重要。
